title: Fix out of memory in dfg-optimize stage

features.name: case statement with incomplete coverage in timing mode
features.description: Code should include a case statement with incomplete coverage that triggers CASEINCOMPLETE warning, used in a timing-enabled elaboration context
features.snippet:
case (cmn_setup)
  0: begin end
  1: begin end
  // missing coverage for pattern 0x2
endcase

features.name: large design with multiple include files
features.description: Code should include a large design with multiple nested include files that triggers OOM during DFG optimization
features.snippet: // Design with many nested includes triggering DFG optimization memory issue
